slider.hungking_title: Hung Kings Memorial Temple (Tao Dan Park)
slider.hungking_desc: The spiritual culture of the origin
slider.notredame_desc: An architectural masterpiece in the city center

about.desc_1: Welcome to the website My Beloved City, a lively online learning space about the history, geography, and socio-culture of the city named after Uncle Ho.
about.desc_2: The website is designed for teachers, students, and anyone who loves to learn about this land. Here, you will step into a journey to discover the heroic pages of history, prominent geographical features, and the beauty in the lives of the people here.

geo.subtitle: OVERVIEW
geo.desc_1: Explore Ho Chi Minh City through a vivid geographical lens – where visual maps open up before your eyes a journey to deeply understand the terrain, climate, rivers, and the continuous urban development rhythm of the city.
geo.desc_2: The website provides a rich repository of images, videos, and useful data, helping you clearly see the transformation of urban space; explore each ward and commune; and understand Ho Chi Minh City's crucial role in the southern key economic region.

history.subtitle: FLOW OF TIME
history.title: Heroic History
history.desc: Exploring the historical depth of Ho Chi Minh City is a fascinating journey back in time. It takes you back to the first exploring steps to witness the formation and development of a resilient land. Through many upheavals, this land has written golden pages of history in the struggle for national independence.
history.relic_desc: Architectural works that bear the mark of time.
history.figure_desc: Outstanding people who have brought glory to this land.

culture.subtitle: DIVERSITY and IDENTITY
culture.title: Culture & Society
culture.desc_1: Not only the economic locomotive of the whole country, Ho Chi Minh City is also a vivid picture where traditional identity blends with modern lifestyle. From ancient temples nestled next to skyscrapers, to street food vendors selling rice paper in the middle of a bustling city.
culture.desc_2: Let's explore the cultural depth of this land, where every street corner holds interesting stories about customs, festivals, and the generosity and gratitude of the people here.

learning.subtitle: TREASURE OF KNOWLEDGE
learning.title: Materials & Review
learning.desc: Access a rich treasure of knowledge from reference books to engaging review games.
learning.doc_desc: Synthesize books, articles, and precious materials about the history and culture of Saigon past and present.
learning.game_desc: Challenge your knowledge through fun Quiz games, learning and playing at the same time is extremely satisfying.

overview.item1_desc: Explore the strategic location of Ho Chi Minh City
overview.item2_desc: Explore the key economic sectors of the city
overview.item3_desc: Learn about the topography, climate, river and canal systems, sea, organisms, soil and minerals
overview.item4_desc: Learn about the population distribution and urban characteristics of Ho Chi Minh City

location.hero_desc: HCMC borders Dong Nai, Dong Thap, Lâm Đồng, Tây Ninh provinces and the East Sea; creating a driving force for the development of the Southeast, Southwest regions and the whole country.
location.stat_desc: The new scale of HCMC after administrative arrangement with a large area, high population, and dense network of grassroots units.
location.hl1_desc: HCMC borders Dong Nai, Dong Thap, Lâm Đồng, Tây Ninh and the East Sea, creating a continuous connection axis between the highlands, the plains and the sea.
location.hl2_desc: The Saigon River, Dong Nai River along with a dense network of canals create a rich waterway transport system.
location.hl3_desc: Tan Son Nhat Airport, Cat Lai Port, national highway system — one of the important international trade hubs of the South.
location.hl4_desc: Connecting Southeast Asia and the world, it is one of the dynamic urban areas in the region with strongly developing modern infrastructure.
location.canvas_intro_desc: Synthesize information on geographical location, natural characteristics, and administrative units of HCMC.

economy.hero_desc: Ho Chi Minh City is the largest economic center of the country with 3 key economic sectors, more than 10 large-scale industrial park systems, and high-tech agriculture, playing a leading role in national economic development.
economy.sec1_desc: The city is the largest service center in the country. Some prominent sub-sectors: transportation, commerce, tourism, real estate, finance - banking...
economy.sec2_desc: Attracting thousands of enterprises; prominent in mechanics, textiles, footwear, plastics - rubber, electronics, food processing and seafood. Many large IPs: Hiep Phuoc, Vinh Loc, Tan Phu Trung, Linh Trung...
economy.sec3_desc: Growing vegetables, orchids, ornamental plants, rice; raising cattle, pigs, poultry. Application of membrane houses, net houses, hydroponics, temperature - humidity sensors, solar energy.
economy.outlook_desc: The city continues to expand scientific research in technology, promote regional connectivity and strive to maintain its role as the economic locomotive of the whole country. In parallel, HCMC is facing environmental challenges - water, air, waste pollution - and is promoting green urban solutions, smart cities, and public transport development.
economy.canvas_intro_desc: Overview of the economic structure, industrial parks, and development potential of HCMC.

nature.hero_desc: Explore the rich ecosystem, diverse topography, tropical climate and dense river network of HCMC.
nature.mo1_desc: More than 2,000 diverse living species, including flora, fauna, and microorganisms, create a rich ecosystem for the city.
nature.mo2_desc: Many different types of soil suitable for agriculture, construction, and urban development.
nature.mo3_desc: Mineral resources include sand, gravel, stone, clay, and many others serving construction and industry.
nature.mo4_desc: Ho Chi Minh City has only two seasons: dry season and rainy season, influenced by monsoons.
nature.mo5_desc: Low plains, depressions, swamps; Undulating high mounds; Flat, low plains; Low hills; Coastal topography, creating a diverse landscape.
nature.mo6_desc: The system of rivers and canals is extremely diverse, favorable for waterway transport activities, agricultural production, ecotourism...
nature.mo7_desc: Bordering the East Sea with more than 2 sea areas, creating conditions for marine economic development and international trade.
nature.canvas_intro_desc: All visual content about the natural geography of Ho Chi Minh City.

population.hero_desc: Explore the vibrant population picture of Ho Chi Minh City - a special urban area with over 14 million residents, 168 administrative units, and the harmony of 54 fraternal ethnic groups.
population.st1_desc: HCMC is a special centrally-run city, holding the role of the country's largest economic center with outstanding development speed.
population.st2_desc: Over 14 million people living, working, and studying, creating the most vibrant city in Vietnam.
population.st3_desc: Including districts, directly-affiliated cities, wards, and communes - a complete administrative system.
population.st4_desc: The Kinh ethnic group accounts for the majority, along with 53 other ethnic minorities living together harmoniously.
population.eth1_desc: Accounting for the majority in the city's demographic structure, playing a leading role in socio-economic and urban cultural development.
population.eth2_desc: The largest ethnic minority community, concentrated mainly in Ho Chi Minh City with a rich culture.
population.eth3_desc: Bringing a unique Champa cultural heritage, contributing to the cultural diversity of the city.
population.eth4_desc: The Khmer people community with characterized cultural identity and distinctive traditional festivals.
population.eth5_desc: Along with many other ethnic groups from all over the country, creating a rich multi-ethnic community picture.
population.canvas_intro_desc: All visual content about the population geography of Ho Chi Minh City.

overview.item1_desc: Architectural works marking the passage of time
overview.item2_desc: Outstanding people who have brought glory to this land

relics.hero_desc: Historical - cultural relics are architectural works, locations and artifacts with historical, cultural and scientific values ranked and preserved over periods.
relics.era1_desc: The Oc Eo culture developed from the 1st to 7th century, leaving many precious archaeological relics in the Southern region - a testament to the early trade and development of ancient communities.
relics.era2_desc: From the late 16th century, Vietnamese settlers began to reclaim land and establish villages, expanding the territory to the South, forming the land of Saigon - Gia Dinh with architectural works, temples and pagodas marking the early days of establishment.
relics.era3_desc: During nearly a century of French colonialism, many patriotic movements broke out, leaving behind relics associated with the indomitable spirit of the people of Saigon - Cho Lon.
relics.era4_desc: In the 1954 - 1975 period, Saigon was the center of the struggle for the liberation of the South, with many historical relics such as Independence Palace, Cu Chi Tunnels marking glorious victories.
relics.canvas_intro_desc: Images and stories about prominent historical relics in Ho Chi Minh City.

figures.hero_desc: Ho Chi Minh City - a land rich in historical traditions, having made huge contributions to the construction and defense of the Fatherland.
figures.quote_line1: Our people must know our history,
figures.quote_line2: To clearly understand the origin of Vietnam.
figures.card1_desc: Loyal generals and soldiers who fought and sacrificed for the Fatherland.
figures.card2_desc: Great intellectuals who contributed to enlightening and developing the city's culture and education.
figures.card3_desc: Pioneer leaders, guiding the movement for independence.
figures.canvas_intro_desc: Portraits and stories about prominent historical figures in Ho Chi Minh City.

overview.item1_desc: Explore the characteristic flavors of the city
overview.item3_desc: Vibrant cultural events throughout the year

food.hero_desc: Top 20 cities with the best food in the world. This is the crystallization and convergence of the elite of Northern - Central - Southern cuisine and Oriental flavors.
food.bento_title: Top 20 cities with the best food in the world
food.bento_desc: Cuisine here is the crystallization and convergence of cuisine from all Northern - Central - Southern regions and Oriental cuisine.
food.card1_desc: Breakfast, lunch, dinner all have choices from popular to high-end.
food.card2_desc: Cuisine is associated with street culture, fast and convenient but still rich in flavor.
food.card3_desc: Multi-regional · Easy to access · Continuously creative
food.canvas_desc: All visual content about the HCMC culinary journey.

craft.hero_desc: Long-standing craft villages in HCMC preserve sophisticated manual techniques, carrying deep local cultural and economic values.
craft.rib1_desc: The production process goes through many manual stages, requiring patience and high technique from artisans.
craft.rib2_desc: Using nature-friendly materials, exploited from local resources, associated with the land.
craft.rib3_desc: Products carry traditional cultural values, while creating stable livelihoods and expanding to domestic and export markets.
craft.canvas_desc: All visual content about the HCMC craft village journey.

festival.hero_desc: Diverse, combining tradition and modernity - reflecting the rich and vibrant cultural life of city residents.
festival.str1_desc: From Nguyen Tieu festival, Lunar New Year, Nghinh Ong festival to international music events, multicultural fairs - all blend with the city's rhythm.
festival.str2_desc: Festivals reflect multi-ethnic, multi-religious identity, creating space for everyone to honor, experience and share.
festival.str3_desc: Almost every month there are festivals, large and small cultural events taking place throughout the city.
festival.canvas_desc: Images and stories about prominent festivals in HCMC.

overview.item1_desc: Lecture systems and reference materials to help you learn deeply about HCMC
overview.item2_desc: Review knowledge through interactive games and multiple-choice exercises

documents.hero_desc: A miniature knowledge library helping you fully explore the diverse geography, history, and culture of the beloved Southern land.
documents.canvas_desc: Expand the experience, read directly with full browser tools.
documents.empty_desc: Please select a document from the list above to view content.

list.hcm_desc: Explore the dynamic land, historical relics, and diverse culture of Ho Chi Minh City.
list.brvt_title: Ba Ria - Vung Tau Study Materials
list.brvt_desc: Learn about the coastal land of Ba Ria - Vung Tau through history, geography, and famous specialties.
list.bd_desc: Learn about the intersection of culture, industrial economy, and people's lives in Binh Duong province.

quiz.hero_desc: Track your learning progress, scores, and number of attempts. Complete all challenges to become a Saigon expert!
quiz.empty_msg: No games found in this category

questions.clue:
Under seventeen / Hair not yet shoulder-length / A slender young girl / But heroic and indomitable / Known by the whole country / The name of a female hero.
Who is that?
Who is known as the "Founder" of the commandos (đặc công)?

During the anniversary of the Russian October Revolution, he called for people to support the Soviet Union and patriotism against the French. Later, he was arrested and sentenced to 5 years in prison and 10 years of exile.
Who is that?
Who held important positions such as: Secretary of the Southern Party Committee (1945), Chairman of the National Assembly Standing Committee (1955–1960), President (1969–1980)?

“Rather sacrifice than let the wounded be wounded a second time.”
Who said this?

In 1943, he was the provisional Secretary of the Provincial Party Committee of Thu Dau Mot, leading the August Revolution of 1945 in the province.
Who is that?

On June 5, 1911, he departed from Nha Rong Port on the ship Amiral Latouche Tréville to find a way to save the country.
Who is that?
Which character was posthumously awarded the title Hero of the People's Armed Forces by the State in 2001?

Posthumously awarded the title Hero of the People's Armed Forces in 2001. Her name is used for parks and schools in Ho Chi Minh City.
Who is she?

Admitted to the Party in 1929 and became General Secretary of the Party in March 1938.
Who is that?

In 1955–1956, her family participated in building revolutionary bases and hiding cadres. Despite her young age, she distributed leaflets and gathered intelligence on enemy activities.
Who is she?
Author of "Gia Dinh Thanh Thong Chi" - the earliest and most valuable historical, geographical, and cultural book about the South at that time?
Officially honored by UNESCO as a great poet and cultural figure of humanity in late November 2021.

On December 20, 1994, he was posthumously awarded the title Hero of the People's Armed Forces.
Who is that?

chatbot.name: City's Voice
chatbot.error_msg: The AI assistant is temporarily overloaded, please try again in a few minutes!
chatbot.error_config: Missing API Key configuration. Please create VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY in the .env file.
chatbot.error_process: I couldn't process this request. Please try again or check your internet connection.
chatbot.limit_file_size: Please select a file smaller than 5MB.
chatbot.limit_doc_format: .doc format is not yet supported. Please save as .docx or .pdf and try again.
chatbot.limit_word_parse: Could not read Word file content. Please try another file or convert to PDF.
chatbot.limit_word_error: Error reading Word file. Please try again or convert to PDF.
chatbot.default_summary_request: Please summarize the document and state the main points.
chatbot.word_document_label: Word document content sent by user
chatbot.attached_file_instruction: Please respond politely and ask for clarification if needed.
chatbot.prompt_reminder: Reminder: Answer naturally without mentioning source documents. If the question is completely unrelated to Ho Chi Minh City, return exactly this string:
greetings: Hello! I'm 'City's Voice' - your HCMC information assistant. Which corner of Saigon would you like to explore today?
Hi there! If you need to find places to eat, explore relics, or hear about Saigon's history, just give 'City's Voice' a shout!
Hello! 'City's Voice' is ready. Which landmark or delicious dish in Saigon are you curious about?
Greetings! I'm a Saigon local. Just let me know if you want to go anywhere, eat anything, or hear stories from the past!
rejections: Oh my, this question is a bit 'out of range' for me! 😅 I'm a Saigon Assistant, so I'm only an expert in tourism, culture, and cuisine. Ask me about something else!
This one is too hard, I'll pass! 🤣 I'm just a Saigon local expert, I know where to eat and play, but I'm clueless about this. Ask me about cool places to visit!
Ah, this isn't my expertise! 🥲 Ask me anything about roads, relics, or Saigon food, and I've got you covered!
Uh oh, this one's tough for a Saigon expert! 😂 I only know how to tell stories about the city; I don't want to make things up about other stuff.
chatbot.system_prompt:
You are "Saigon Assistant" - a highly knowledgeable and friendly local tour guide. Use "I" and "you" in a friendly manner.

REPLY RULES:

CORE KNOWLEDGE: Always prioritize information from CHATBOT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE silently. Answer naturally, absolutely DO NOT use phrases like "According to internal data", "According to CHATBOT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE", or "The document states".

EXTENDED KNOWLEDGE (CUISINE, HOT SPOTS): If the user asks about eateries, delicacies, travel itineraries... that are not in the data, YOU ARE ALLOWED to confidently use external knowledge to suggest enthusiastically like a true Saigonese!

OFF-TOPIC PROTECTION: ONLY IF the user asks about topics completely unrelated to Ho Chi Minh City (e.g., solving math, writing code, politics, foreign geography...), you will return EXACTLY ONE STRING: OUT_OF_KB

Present clearly, bold main points, and keep it concise.
